# classicQ v3.0.0 - heavy refresh of Fodquake

A modernization of Fodquake aimed at running QuakeWorld on modern hardware
without dropping the classic feel.

Build & platform:
- Zig build system replaces legacy Makefile
- SDL2 replaces all platform-specific code
- Internal engine and asset paths renamed to classicQ
- Switched to C23

Rendering:
- HiDPI: render at native rez, auto-scale HUD by DPI factor
- Software gamma

Protocol & assets:
- FTE_PEXT_CHUNKEDDOWNLOADS for faster downloads
- FTE_PEXT2 protocol support
- MVD improvements
- BSP2 format support, BSPX header parsing + RGBLIGHTING for colored lighting

Server browser:
- Full scan time 25s -> 6s
- Ctrl+R does fast info-only refresh
- Dead / QWFWD / QTV / TeamFortress servers filtered at scan level

UX & feel:
- Stair smoothing fix (reported by dirtbox, located thanks to r00k's hint)
- Player Setup: live colour preview
- Customize Controls + Customize Teamplay menus reworked
- Native error dialog when id1 paks are missing
- Additional UI and HUD improvements

Removed:
- MP3 / Winamp integration
- Context-sensitive tab completion (CSTC) module
- Software renderer, x86 assembly, all legacy platform backends

Bugfixes throughout.

## Requires

You'll need `pak0.pak` and `pak1.pak` from a licensed copy of Quake.
Place them in `id1/` after extracting the ZIP.
